title.en: China-to-Equatorial Guinea BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入赤道几内亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入赤道幾內亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Equatorial Guinea SEGESA grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards applicable in the absence of a national BESS conformity regime, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 50 Hz / 230/400 V grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Equatorial Guinea has no strong national standards body; the absence of a conformity assessment regime is itself a key market-access risk.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与赤道几内亚SEGESA并网要求、在缺乏国家BESS合格评定制度情况下适用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3及IEC 62281运输要求及50 Hz / 230/400 V电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031及GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。赤道几内亚无强大的国家标准机构；缺乏合格评定制度本身即是主要市场准入风险。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與赤道幾內亞SEGESA併網要求、在缺乏國家BESS合格評定制度情況下適用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3及IEC 62281運輸要求及50 Hz / 230/400 V電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031及GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。赤道幾內亞無強大的國家標準機構；缺乏合格評定制度本身即是主要市場准入風險。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEGESA grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed mandatory national BESS conformity regime as of the dataset date; the absence of a published conformity assessment framework is itself a material risk. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current SEGESA technical connection requirements, applicable fire-safety authority requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEGESA并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。截至本数据集日期，赤道几内亚尚无经确认的强制性国家BESS合格评定制度；缺乏已发布的合格评定框架本身即是重大风险。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行SEGESA技术并网要求、适用消防安全主管机关要求、UN运输法规及项目业主规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEGESA併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。截至本數據集日期，赤道幾內亞尚無經確認的強制性國家BESS合格評定制度；缺乏已發布的合格評定框架本身即是重大風險。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行SEGESA技術併網要求、適用消防安全主管機關要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主規格。

answer_first.en: Equatorial Guinea has no strong national standards body and no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety or conformity regime as of the dataset date. The electricity utility is SEGESA (Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial). The grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz — sharing frequency with China but differing in voltage (China is 220/380 V). The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Equatorial Guinea are: (1) absence of a published national conformity assessment framework — the lack of a clear conformity regime is itself a primary market-access risk requiring direct SEGESA engagement; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project and financier acceptance in the absence of a national standard; (3) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in SEGESA or project-owner specifications; (4) NFPA 855 or equivalent fire-safety installation design, expected by international project developers operating in the market; (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions; and (6) voltage re-parameterisation — PCS configured for China's 220/380 V must be reconfigured for Equatorial Guinea's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in project or financier review. Tropical humidity derating applies and should be reflected in equipment specifications. All goods enter via Malabo or Bata ports.
answer_first.zh: 截至本数据集日期，赤道几内亚无强大的国家标准机构，亦无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全或合格评定制度。电力公用事业单位为SEGESA（赤道几内亚电力公司）。电网运行参数为230/400 V、50 Hz——与中国共享频率但电压不同（中国为220/380 V）。中国BESS出口赤道几内亚的实际差距包括：（1）缺乏已发布的国家合格评定框架——缺乏明确合格评定制度本身即是主要市场准入风险，须与SEGESA直接接触；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为在缺乏国家标准情况下项目和融资方验收的国际预期基准；（3）SEGESA或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（4）NFPA 855或同等消防安全安装设计，受在该市场运营的国际项目开发商预期；（5）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输测试文件；（6）电压重新参数配置——针对中国220/380 V配置的PCS须重新配置为赤道几内亚230/400 V 50 Hz。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031及GB/T 36558不被项目或融资方审查接受为IEC证据的替代依据。热带湿度降额适用，应在设备规格中体现。所有货物经由马拉博或巴塔港进口。
answer_first.zht: 截至本數據集日期，赤道幾內亞無強大的國家標準機構，亦無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全或合格評定制度。電力公用事業單位為SEGESA（赤道幾內亞電力公司）。電網運行參數為230/400 V、50 Hz——與中國共享頻率但電壓不同（中國為220/380 V）。中國BESS出口赤道幾內亞的實際差距包括：（1）缺乏已發布的國家合格評定框架——缺乏明確合格評定制度本身即是主要市場准入風險，須與SEGESA直接接觸；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為在缺乏國家標準情況下項目和融資方驗收的國際預期基準；（3）SEGESA或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（4）NFPA 855或同等消防安全安裝設計，受在該市場運營的國際項目開發商預期；（5）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸測試文件；（6）電壓重新參數配置——針對中國220/380 V配置的PCS須重新配置為赤道幾內亞230/400 V 50 Hz。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031及GB/T 36558不被項目或融資方審查接受為IEC證據的替代依據。熱帶濕度降額適用，應在設備規格中體現。所有貨物經由馬拉博或巴塔港進口。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
